title: UPSC ORA Operation Officer and Other Various Post Online Form 2025
post_name: UPSC Operations Officer, Drug Inspector, Legal Officer, Training Officer, Specialist & Other Various Post ORA Recruitment Advt No 06/2025 Apply Online for 494 Post
fee_payment_method: Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking Only.
age_relaxation_notes: Age Relaxation Extra as per UPSC ORA Advt No 06/2025 Legal Officer, Drug Inspector and Other Various Post Recruitment Rules.
how_to_apply: Union Public Service Commission UPSC ORA Advt No 06/2025 Various Post Recruitment 2025 Online Form Candidate Apply Between 24 May 2025 to 12 June 2025
Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in UPSC ORA Latest Career Jobs.
Kindly Check and Collect the All Document - Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details.
Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form - Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc.
Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully.
If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed.
Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
